name: Idle Blocks Tycoon
description: Idle Blocks Tycoon is a fun idle tycoon game where you upgrade your mine, mine more exciting ores and get rich in the process! Start with a humble character and a small patch of grass, then dig your way through layers of increasingly valuable ores. Upgrade your mining speed, unlock powerful auto-miners, and expand your operation from a tiny dig site into a massive empire.
instructions: Desktop Scroll to zoom Right click to pan camera Click to unlock features Mobile Pinch to zoom and rotate
